beatSheet.summary: Developer frustration: explaining project context for the 100th time
beatSheet.viewerStateBefore: Unaware this is a solvable problem
beatSheet.viewerStateAfter: Recognizes own frustration, wants to know the solution
beatSheet.informationDelta: Claude Code has a persistent memory problem that affects daily workflow
beatSheet.whyThisBeatExists: Hook: immediate self-recognition in 2 seconds, establishes the pain

beatSheet.summary: Specific example: same setup repeated across 30 days, 3 projects
beatSheet.viewerStateBefore: Recognizes the problem but may think it is just how things are
beatSheet.viewerStateAfter: Sees concrete evidence that this is measurable and real
beatSheet.informationDelta: Exact scenario: 5 minutes lost per session, 30 days of data
beatSheet.whyThisBeatExists: First promise fulfillment: prove the problem is real with data

beatSheet.summary: CLAUDE.md file mechanism: what it is, where it lives, how Claude reads it
beatSheet.viewerStateBefore: Knows the problem is real but does not know the solution
beatSheet.viewerStateAfter: Understands the mechanism: a file in project root that persists across sessions
beatSheet.informationDelta: CLAUDE.md is a specific file with specific location and specific behavior
beatSheet.whyThisBeatExists: Core reveal: the solution is simpler than expected

beatSheet.summary: 30-day experiment results: session setup time, file growth, before/after
beatSheet.viewerStateAfter: Convinced by real metrics and actual file content
beatSheet.informationDelta: Setup time dropped from 5 min to 30s, file grew from 10 to 200+ lines
beatSheet.whyThisBeatExists: Evidence section: show the actual numbers and file

beatSheet.summary: What CLAUDE.md cannot do: API memory, cross-project, automatic learning
beatSheet.viewerStateAfter: Has realistic expectations of what it can and cannot do
beatSheet.informationDelta: Clear boundaries prevent disappointment and misuse
beatSheet.whyThisBeatExists: Boundary section: prevent over-promising, build trust through honesty

beatSheet.summary: Step-by-step: create CLAUDE.md, start with project context, grow over time
beatSheet.viewerStateBefore: Understands the concept but unsure how to start
beatSheet.viewerStateAfter: Has a clear first action: create the file today
beatSheet.informationDelta: Concrete steps to start, with example content
beatSheet.whyThisBeatExists: Action section: convert understanding into immediate behavior
